approved_inputs.self_hash_policy: REVIEW_DECISION.json binds the subject hash; final P2_SPEC_LOCK recomputes the review decision sha256 from disk.

decision_for_review: Approved by human gate for use as P2_SPEC_LOCK input evidence.
next_allowed_action_if_approved: Create P2_SPEC_LOCK only after explicit user request; otherwise continue with the next review or discussion step.

repair_summary.gap: code_targets were not covered by allowed_write_paths_after_lock for P2-IMPL-01 through P2-IMPL-04
repair_summary.fix: added exact code target paths and executable path coverage checks to the implementation index
repair_summary.risk_removed: implementation workpacks no longer require code changes that their own path policy forbids

repair_summary.gap: required artifact contract paths were missing from allowed_write_paths_after_lock for P2-IMPL-01, P2-IMPL-02, and P2-IMPL-05
repair_summary.fix: added missing artifact paths from P2_ARTIFACT_FIELD_CONTRACTS.json and mirrored them into test obligations
repair_summary.risk_removed: build-lock obligations can be implemented without off-contract writes

repair_summary.gap: implementation order existed mainly as prose and sequence numbers
repair_summary.fix: added direct and cumulative dependency fields for every implementation workpack
repair_summary.risk_removed: later automation can verify execution order without parsing markdown

repair_summary.gap: P2-SPEC-03 lock input file hashes were null without an explicit final-lock resolution rule
repair_summary.fix: added pending candidate hash resolution policy requiring lock tooling to recompute concrete file hashes
repair_summary.risk_removed: final P2_SPEC_LOCK cannot accidentally preserve candidate-only null hash rows
